messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0026",
  "title": "画面与音效表现",
  "page_index": 16,
  "page_range": "16"
}

Section text:
画面与音效表现

message.content: This section is titled "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance) and functions solely as a topic heading. It can only answer high-level navigational questions regarding the section's focus on graphical and sound presentation. The provided text contains no body content, so it does not provide specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. For retrieval purposes, this node should be indexed strictly as a structural marker for visual/audio evaluation topics rather than a source of factual or analytical content.
